title: Jenkins の 500 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: Most factual claims are accurate and generally accepted troubleshooting steps for Jenkins.
The information regarding Java version compatibility for Jenkins 2.426+ is outdated and could lead users to use an unsupported Java version.
All major factual claims are supported by search results, primarily official Jenkins documentation and community resources.
Relying on outdated Java version information for Jenkins can lead to stability, performance, and security issues.
freshness score is below the threshold
potentially dangerous command or insecure setting detected
one or more claims are unsupported or unverifiable
required_actions: Update the information regarding Java version support for Jenkins, specifically noting the deprecation of Java 11 for LTS versions after Fall 2024 and the current requirement for Java 17 or 21.
Add explicit citations for all factual claims.

Clarify the connection between specific script errors (missing files, permissions, external commands) and the direct occurrence of a 500 Internal Server Error in Jenkins, or remove the claim if no direct source is found.
Review current official docs and update changed API/spec/pricing details.
Replace risky commands/settings with safer alternatives and warnings.
Add official or primary source URLs for unsupported claims.

sources.title: Introducing the 2 + 2 + 2 Java support plan - Jenkins
sources.claim: Jenkins 2.426.1 LTS supports Java 11, 17, and 21. In Fall 2024, Jenkins will require Java 17 or 21 and drop support for Java 11.

sources.title: Java Support Policy - Jenkins
sources.claim: Unsupported Java versions will prevent the Jenkins controller from running. These requirements apply to all components of the Jenkins system.

sources.title: How do I uninstall a plugin from Jenkins (Hudson)? - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: Manually uninstalling a plugin involves stopping Jenkins and removing the .hpi file and its corresponding folder.

sources.title: Removing and disabling plugins - Jenkins
sources.claim: Jenkins allows you to disable a plugin as well as uninstall a plugin. Plugins can be disabled from the UI or by creating a .jpi.disabled file.

sources.title: Changelog for 2.426.1 - Jenkins
sources.claim: Jenkins 2.426.1 supports Java 21.

sources.title: [2024年11月15日以降] JenkinsのJava 11サポート終了について - Devplatform blog
sources.claim: 2024年11月15日以降のJenkins LTSはJava 17または21を必要とし、Java 11のサポートを終了します。

sources.title: Jenkins LTS vs Weekly: Which Version Should You Use? - Karandeep Singh
sources.claim: Jenkins 2.463+ (October 2024 LTS onward) dropped Java 11, requiring migration to Java 17 or Java 21.

sources.title: Migrate to Java 21 - CloudBees Documentation
sources.claim: The Jenkins community supports running Jenkins with Java 21 since version 2.426.1.

sources.title: When submitting a configuration form to Jenkins, I get a 500 error saying This page expects a form submission but had only - CloudBees Documentation
sources.claim: When submitting a configuration form to Jenkins, a 500 error can occur. Often, you will see a 500 error encountered while executing some Javascript.

sources.title: Internal Server Error - Using Jenkins
sources.claim: An internal server error (500) can occur frequently in Jenkins deployments.

sources.title: Jenkinsの「OutOfMemoryError : Java heap space」の対応方法・調査まとめ - モリ研
sources.claim: Jenkins build jobs and plugins can consume large amounts of memory, leading to Java heap memory exhaustion (OutOfMemoryError). This is common in large projects or environments with many concurrent builds.

sources.title: JenkinsのOutOfMemoryErrorを修正する方法 - Linux-JP.org
sources.claim: If the OutOfMemoryError is due to a small heap size, allocating a larger heap size (e.g., 2GB to 16GB) by setting -Xms and -Xmx parameters in JAVA_OPTS can resolve it. This can be done by editing `jenkins.xml` on Windows or the systemd service file on Linux.

sources.title: Jenkinsへの手動プラグイン導入方法 - Qiita
sources.claim: Installing new plugins on an old version of Jenkins can lead to compatibility or dependency issues, causing plugin installation to fail.

sources.title: 【2024年11月最新】Jenkinsとは？その特徴や使い方について分かりやすく解説 - Offers
sources.claim: You can check the list of installed plugins and install new ones via 'Manage Jenkins' -> 'Manage Plugins'. Plugin compatibility and dependencies need to be carefully considered.

sources.title: JenkinsのLDAP設定ミスでログイン不能！config.xml修正による復旧フロー - Zenn
sources.claim: Editing `config.xml` directly requires taking a backup first to prevent startup issues due to XML syntax errors.

sources.title: Jenkinsの設定やジョブの設定を覗いてみる | 株式会社ヘキサドライブ | HEXADRIVE | ゲーム制作を中心としたコンテンツクリエイト会社
sources.claim: Jenkins' main configurations are in `jenkins.xml` (for startup settings like port numbers) and `config.xml` (for system settings like concurrent builds, slave info). These are located in the Jenkins home directory.

sources.title: Nginx reverse proxy causes 500 Internal Server error in Jenkins - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: A 500 Internal Server Error can be caused by proxy misconfiguration when accessing Jenkins.

sources.title: Status code: 500 Internal Server Error After I install Credentials Plugin - Jenkins community
sources.claim: Installing a new plugin can cause a 500 Internal Server Error.

sources.title: Jenkins CI – Error 500 When Opening Views - Kobi's Blog
sources.claim: A 500 Server Error can occur when clicking on views in Jenkins, with logs showing exceptions like `java.lang.NullPointerException`.

sources.title: Jenkins plugin HttpRequest returns 500 error - Stack Overflow
sources.claim: A 500 error can occur during API requests (e.g., via Jenkins HttpRequest plugin) due to malformed request bodies.

sources.title: 1.5. Source-to-Image による Jenkins イメージのカスタマイズ - Red Hat Documentation
sources.claim: You can customize the Jenkins image by copying custom Jenkins job definitions, adding plugins, or replacing the bundled `config.xml` file with your own custom settings.

sources.title: Jenkins-SlaveでUnitTestがOutOfMemory #gradle - Qiita
sources.claim: OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space or GC overhead limit exceeded can occur during Jenkins builds, especially for test tasks, indicating insufficient heap memory.

sources.title: How to disable/Uninstalling Jenkins a plugin when Jenkins is down using command line?
sources.claim: If a plugin is preventing Jenkins from restarting, it can be disabled via the file system by creating a `.jpi.disabled` file in the `$JENKINS_HOME/plugins` folder.

sources.title: 【2025年版】新人エンジニアが知るべきJenkinsプラグイン完全ガイド - note
sources.claim: Plugin crashes or conflicts can lead to 500 errors in Jenkins, often after new installations or updates. Troubleshooting involves identifying and temporarily disabling problematic plugins.

unsupported_claims: 特にスクリプトの実行中にファイルが見つからない、権限がない、外部コマンドが存在しないなどの状況です。
